{
    "name": "Project Tab Ordering",
    "version": "18.0.1.0.0",
    "license": "LGPL-3",
    "author": "ACGLP Development Team",
    "category": "Services/Project",
    "summary": "Deterministic tab order on Project form (primary notebook).",
    "description": """
Project Tab Ordering
====================

This module sets a consistent, predictable order for all tabs on the Project form.

Tab Order (left to right):
---------------------------
1. Deliverables
2. Notes
3. Activities
4. Closing Checklist
5. Team
6. Contract Info
7. Budget & SOW
8. Project Contacts
9. Marketing
10. Quality Assurance
11. CAPA
12. Board of Directors
13. Bonding
14. Incidents
15. Lessons Learned
16. Meetings
17. Subcontractors
18. Appointments
19. Other tabs...

Dependencies:
-------------
This module depends on all modules that add tabs to ensure proper ordering.
    """,
    "depends": [
        "project",
        "project_custom_fields",
        "project_notes",
        "project_kickoff_checklist",
        "project_past_performance",
        "quality_assurance",
        "capa",
        "project_bonding",
        "incident_reports",
        "lessons_learned",
        "warranty",
    ],
    "data": [
        "views/project_tab_ordering.xml",
    ],
    "installable": True,
    "application": False,
    "auto_install": False,
}

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>
    <!-- Set sequence attributes (metadata / potential future use) -->
    <record id="view_project_form_tab_ordering" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.form.tab.ordering</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.edit_project"/>
        <field name="priority">99</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">

            <!-- 1. DELIVERABLES -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='deliverables']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">10</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 7. BUDGET & SOW -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='budget_sow_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">750</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 2. NOTES -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='project_notes_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">20</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 3. ACTIVITIES -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='activities_table_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">30</attribute>
            </xpath>         

            <!-- 5. TEAM -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='TEAM']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">50</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 6. CONTRACT INFO -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='contract_info']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">40</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 8. PROJECT CONTACTS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='contacts']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">80</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 10. QUALITY ASSURANCE -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='quality_assurance']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">100</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 11. CAPA -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='capa']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">110</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 12. BOARD OF DIRECTORS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='bod_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">120</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 13. BONDING -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='bonding']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">130</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 14. INCIDENTS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='incidents']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">140</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 15. LESSONS LEARNED -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='lessons_learned']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">150</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 16. MEETINGS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='project_meetings']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">160</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 17. SUBCONTRACTORS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='subcontractors_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">170</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 18. CERTIFICATIONS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='certifications']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">180</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 19. APPOINTMENTS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='appointments_page']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">190</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 20. WARRANTY -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='warranty']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">200</attribute>
            </xpath>
            
            <!-- 9. MARKETING -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='marketing']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">800</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 4. CLOSING CHECKLIST -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='closing_checklist_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">900</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- Settings tab - push to end -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='settings']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">1000</attribute>
            </xpath>

        </field>
    </record>

    <!-- Physical DOM order (what the web client actually renders) -->
    <record id="view_project_form_tab_ordering_moves" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.form.tab.ordering.moves</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.edit_project"/>
        <field name="priority">100</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">

            <!-- Move tabs into desired physical order -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='deliverables']" position="after">
                <page name="project_notes_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='project_notes_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="activities_table_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='activities_table_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="closing_checklist_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='closing_checklist_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="TEAM" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='TEAM']" position="after">
                <page name="contract_info" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='contract_info']" position="after">
                <page name="budget_sow_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='budget_sow_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="contacts" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='contacts']" position="after">
                <page name="marketing" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='marketing']" position="after">
                <page name="quality_assurance" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='quality_assurance']" position="after">
                <page name="capa" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='capa']" position="after">
                <page name="bod_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='bod_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="bonding" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='bonding']" position="after">
                <page name="incidents" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='incidents']" position="after">
                <page name="lessons_learned" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='lessons_learned']" position="after">
                <page name="project_meetings" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='project_meetings']" position="after">
                <page name="subcontractors_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='subcontractors_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="certifications" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='certifications']" position="after">
                <page name="appointments_page" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='appointments_page']" position="after">
                <page name="warranty" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='warranty']" position="after">
                <page name="settings" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

        </field>
    </record>
</odoo>

# Project Tab Ordering

## Overview

This module provides deterministic, consistent ordering for all tabs on the Project form view. Without this module, tab order depends on module installation order, which can vary between environments.

## Current Tab Order

The tabs appear in this order (left to right):

1. **Deliverables** - Project deliverables and milestones
2. **Notes** - Project notes and comments
3. **Activities** - Planned and done activities
4. **Closing Checklist** - Project closing checklist items
5. **Team** - Project team members
6. **Contract Info** - Contract information and details
7. **Budget & SOW** - Budget and Scope of Work
8. **Project Contacts** - Project-related contacts
9. **Marketing** - Past performance and marketing info
10. **Quality Assurance** - QA records and documentation
11. **CAPA** - Corrective and Preventive Actions
12. **Board of Directors** - BOD-related information
13. **Bonding** - Project bonding information
14. **Incidents** - Incident reports
15. **Lessons Learned** - Lessons learned documentation
16. **Meetings** - Project meetings
17. **Subcontractors** - Subcontractor information
18. **Certifications** - Project certifications
19. **Appointments** - Project appointments
20. **Warranty** - Warranty information
21. **Settings** - Project settings (at the end)

## How It Works

The module uses two approaches to ensure tabs appear in the correct order:

1. **Sequence Attributes**: Sets `sequence` attributes on each tab (metadata for potential future use)
2. **Physical DOM Moves**: Physically moves tabs in the DOM tree to ensure correct rendering order

## Customizing Tab Order

To change the tab order:

1. Edit `views/project_tab_ordering.xml`
2. Update sequence numbers in the first `<record>` (keep gaps of 10 for future insertions)
3. Update the `position="move"` statements in the second `<record>` to match your desired physical order
4. Upgrade the module

## Dependencies

This module depends on all modules that add tabs to the Project form:

- `project` (base)
- `project_custom_fields`
- `project_notes`
- `project_kickoff_checklist`
- `project_past_performance`
- `quality_assurance`
- `capa`
- `bd_bod`
- `project_bonding`
- `incident_reports`
- `lessons_learned`
- `warranty`

**Note**: If new modules are installed that add tabs to the Project form, they should be added to the `depends` list and their tabs should be positioned in this module.

## Technical Details

- **Priority**: 99 for sequence setting, 100 for moves (ensures this runs after module-specific views)
- **Model**: `project.project`
- **Inherits**: `project.edit_project`

## Installation

1. Place the module in your addons directory
2. Update the app list
3. Install "Project Tab Ordering"
4. Refresh the browser

## Avoiding Circular Dependencies

If a new module needs to be added that creates a circular dependency:

1. Remove it from the `depends` list
2. Set that module to depend on `project_tab_ordering` instead
3. Add its tab positioning in this module

## License

LGPL-3.0 or later

## Dependency Map - project_tab_ordering

### Module Dependencies Tree

```
project_tab_ordering
├── project (Odoo core)
├── project_custom_fields
│   ├── project
│   ├── contacts
│   ├── hr_employee_certifications
│   ├── mail
│   ├── ticket_system
│   ├── activity_modification
│   ├── common_logging
│   └── subcontractor_evaluation
├── project_notes
│   ├── project
│   ├── contacts
│   ├── base
│   ├── mail
│   └── project_custom_fields ⟲ (already a direct dependency)
├── project_kickoff_checklist
│   ├── project
│   └── project_custom_fields ⟲
├── project_past_performance
│   ├── project
│   ├── contacts
│   ├── base
│   ├── mail
│   ├── hr
│   ├── project_custom_fields ⟲
│   └── calendar
├── quality_assurance
│   ├── project
│   ├── hr
│   ├── crm
│   ├── contacts
│   ├── base
│   ├── mail
│   ├── project_custom_fields ⟲
│   ├── calendar
│   ├── capa ⟲ (redundant - also direct dependency)
│   └── lessons_learned ⟲ (redundant - also direct dependency)
├── capa
│   ├── base
│   ├── project
│   ├── mail
│   └── hr
├── project_bonding
│   ├── base
│   ├── hr
│   ├── mail
│   ├── project
│   └── crm
├── incident_reports
│   ├── base
│   ├── hr
│   ├── mail
│   └── project
├── lessons_learned
│   ├── base
│   ├── contacts
│   ├── hr
│   ├── crm
│   ├── mail
│   └── project
└── warranty
    ├── base
    ├── project
    └── hr
```

### Analysis

**✓ No Circular Dependencies Found**
- None of the dependency modules reference `project_tab_ordering`
- The dependency graph is acyclic and valid

**⚠️ Redundant Dependencies Detected**
- `quality_assurance` depends on `capa` and `lessons_learned`
- Both are also direct dependencies of `project_tab_ordering`
- These can remain (not harmful, just redundant) OR be removed to simplify

**Installation Order** (automatically handled by Odoo):
1. Base: project, hr, crm, contacts, mail, base, calendar
2. Independent: capa, lessons_learned, warranty, project_bonding, incident_reports
3. Custom fields layer: project_custom_fields (+ its dependencies)
4. Notes/checklists: project_notes, project_kickoff_checklist, project_past_performance
5. Quality: quality_assurance
6. **Finally**: project_tab_ordering

### Recommendation

Current dependency list is **safe and valid**. The module will install without issues. The redundant dependencies (capa, lessons_learned via quality_assurance) don't cause problems and could be kept for explicitness.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>
    <record id="view_project_form_inherit_daily" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.form.inherit.daily</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.edit_project"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//notebook" position="inside">
                <page string="Technician Daily Reports" name="technician_daily_reports" sequence="1300">
                    <group>
                        <field name="daily_count" invisible="1"/>
                        <button name="%(action_project_daily)d" type="action"
                                string="View All Daily Reports"
                                class="oe_stat_button"
                                icon="fa-calendar"
                                context="{'search_default_project_id': id}"/>
                    </group>
                    <field name="daily_ids" context="{'default_project_id': id}">
                        <list>

                            <field name="image_count"/>
                        </list>
                    </field>
                </page>
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>
</odoo>

26	                    
27	                    <field name="mail_history_ids" options="{'no_create': True}">

56	                                </group>

<odoo>
    <record id="view_task_form_inherit_mail_history" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.form.inherit.mail.history</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.edit_project"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <!-- <xpath expr="//form/sheet/notebook" position="before">
               
            </xpath> -->
            <xpath expr="//notebook/page[last()]" position="after">
                <page string="Mail history" name="mail_history" sequence="1000">
                    <header>
                        <button name="action_graph_fetch_mails_by_custom_subjects"
                                type="object"
                                string="Fetch from mailbox (Graph)"
                                class="btn-secondary"
                                icon="fa-cloud-download"
                                help="Ingests recent messages from the configured shared mailbox (Settings) that match the custom subject lines above (OR, substring)"/>
                        <button name="action_generate_ai_summaries" 
                                type="object" 
                                string="Generate AI Summaries"
                                class="btn-primary"
                                icon="fa-magic"
                                help="Generate AI summaries for all emails in this project that need them"/>
                    </header>
                    
                    <field name="mail_history_ids" options="{'no_create': True}">
                        <list create="0" decoration-warning="needs_summary == True">
                            <field name="date"/>
                            <field name="message_subject" string="Subject"/>
                            <field name="sender" string="From"/>
                            <field name="action_task_html" string="Summary" widget="html" class="text-break"/>
                            <field name="recipients" optional="hide"/>
                            <field name="needs_summary" string="Needs summary" optional="hide" widget="boolean_toggle"/>
                        </list>

                        <form>
                            <header>
                                <button name="action_regenerate_summary" 
                                        type="object" 
                                        string="Regenerate AI Summary" 
                                        class="btn-secondary"
                                        invisible="not email_body"
                                        icon="fa-refresh"/>
                            </header>
                            <sheet>
                                <group>
                                    <group>
                                        <field name="date"/>
                                        <field name="sender"/>
                                    </group>
                                    <group>
                                        <field name="recipients"/>
                                        <field name="needs_summary" readonly="1"/>
                                    </group>
                                </group>

                                <group string="Legacy SharePoint fields (unused — email summaries are not pushed to SharePoint or Teams)">
                                    <group>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_sync_status" readonly="1"/>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_list_item_id" readonly="1"/>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_last_sync_at" readonly="1"/>
                                    </group>
                                    <group>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_sync_key" readonly="1"/>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_web_url" readonly="1"/>
                                    </group>
                                    <field name="sharepoint_sync_error" readonly="1" invisible="not sharepoint_sync_error" colspan="2"/>
                                </group>
                                
                                <separator string="Summary / action points (markdown rendered)"/>
                                <field name="action_task_html" widget="html" readonly="1" nolabel="1" colspan="2" class="o_mail_history_summary"/>
                                <field name="action_task" invisible="1" force_save="1"/>
                                
                                <separator string="Full email content (display)"/>
                                <field name="email_body_html" widget="html" readonly="1" nolabel="1" colspan="2" class="o_mail_history_body"/>
                                <field name="email_body" invisible="1" force_save="1"/>
                            </sheet>
                        </form>
                    </field>
                        <field name="graph_mail_routing_custom_subject" widget="text" colspan="2"
                            placeholder="Email subject. One line per subject fragment; OR match, de-duplicated on save…"/>
                </page>
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>
</odoo>

## Complete Dependency Analysis - All Project Tab Modules

### Missing Modules Found

**Modules that add tabs to project.project but are NOT in project_tab_ordering depends:**

1. **project_change_order** - adds "Change Orders" tab
2. **project_dailys** - adds "Technician Daily Reports" tab  
3. **project_mail_history** - adds "Mail history" tab
4. **bd_sourcesought** - adds "BD mail (opportunity)" tab (conditional, only when source_opportunity_id exists)
5. **project_bom** - creates secondary notebook structure (infrastructure, not a visible tab)

### Updated Dependency Tree (ALL modules)

```
project_tab_ordering (SHOULD depend on all tab-adding modules)
│
├── [CURRENT DEPENDENCIES]
│   ├── project (core)
│   ├── project_custom_fields

│
└── [MISSING DEPENDENCIES - SHOULD BE ADDED]
    ├── project_change_order ⚠️
    │   ├── web

    │   └── hr
    ├── project_mail_history ⚠️
    │   ├── project
    │   ├── project_custom_fields ⟲
    │   ├── common_logging
    │   └── crm_custom_fields
    └── bd_sourcesought ⚠️ (optional - conditional tab)
        ├── common_logging
        ├── mail
        ├── crm
        ├── activity_modification
        ├── crm_custom_fields
        ├── project
        ├── search_leads
        ├── opportunity_project_port
        └── project_mail_history ⟲
```

### Tab Name Mapping (for XML ordering)

| Module | Tab name attribute | Tab string (visible) |
|--------|-------------------|---------------------|
| project | `deliverables` | Deliverables |
| project_notes | `project_notes_tab` | Notes |
| project_custom_fields | `activities_table_tab` | Activities |
| project_kickoff_checklist | `closing_checklist_tab` | Closing Checklist |
| project | `TEAM` | Team |
| project_kickoff_checklist | `contract_info` | Contract Info |
| project_kickoff_checklist | `budget_sow_tab` | Budget & SOW |
| project_custom_fields | `contacts` | Project Contacts |
| project_past_performance | `marketing` | Marketing |
| quality_assurance | `quality_assurance` | Quality Assurance |
| capa | `capa` | CAPA |
| project_bonding | `bonding` | Bonding |
| incident_reports | `incidents` | Incidents |
| lessons_learned | `lessons_learned` | Lessons Learned |
| project_custom_fields | `project_meetings` | Meetings |
| project_custom_fields | `subcontractors_tab` | Subcontractors |
| project_custom_fields | `certifications` | Certifications |
| project_custom_fields | `appointments_page` | Appointments |
| warranty | `warranty` | Warranty |
| **project_change_order** ⚠️ | `change_orders` | Change Orders |
| **project_dailys** ⚠️ | `technician_daily_reports` | Technician Daily Reports |
| **project_mail_history** ⚠️ | `mail_history` | Mail history |
| **bd_sourcesought** ⚠️ | `source_opportunity_bd_mail` | BD mail (opportunity) |
| project | `settings` | Settings |

### Circular Dependency Check

✅ **No circular dependencies detected**
- None of the modules depend back on `project_tab_ordering`
- All dependency chains resolve cleanly

⚠️ **Potential circular risk with bd_sourcesought:**
- bd_sourcesought → project_mail_history → project_custom_fields
- If we add bd_sourcesought to project_tab_ordering, need to verify project_custom_fields doesn't create a cycle

### Recommendations

**Option 1: Add all missing tab modules (complete coverage)**
```python
"depends": [
    "project",
    "project_custom_fields",
    "project_notes",
    "project_kickoff_checklist",
    "project_past_performance",
    "quality_assurance",
    "capa",
    "project_bonding",
    "incident_reports",
    "lessons_learned",
    "warranty",
    "project_change_order",      # NEW
    "project_dailys",            # NEW
    "project_mail_history",      # NEW
    # "bd_sourcesought",         # Optional - tab is conditional
],
```

**Option 2: Add only commonly used modules (simpler)**
```python
# Add: project_change_order, project_dailys, project_mail_history
# Skip: bd_sourcesought (conditional tab, complex dependencies)
```

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Project Tab Ordering

## Overview

This module provides deterministic, consistent ordering for all tabs on the Project form view. Without this module, tab order depends on module installation order, which can vary between environments.

## Current Tab Order

The tabs appear in this order (left to right):

1. **Deliverables** - Project deliverables and milestones
2. **Notes** - Project notes and comments
3. **Activities** - Planned and done activities
4. **Closing Checklist** - Project closing checklist items
5. **Team** - Project team members
6. **Contract Info** - Contract information and details
7. **Budget & SOW** - Budget and Scope of Work
8. **Project Contacts** - Project-related contacts
9. **Marketing** - Past performance and marketing info
10. **Quality Assurance** - QA records and documentation
11. **CAPA** - Corrective and Preventive Actions
12. **Board of Directors** - BOD-related information
13. **Bonding** - Project bonding information
14. **Incidents** - Incident reports
15. **Lessons Learned** - Lessons learned documentation
16. **Meetings** - Project meetings
17. **Subcontractors** - Subcontractor information
18. **Certifications** - Project certifications
19. **Appointments** - Project appointments
20. **Warranty** - Warranty information
21. **Settings** - Project settings (at the end)

## How It Works

The module uses two approaches to ensure tabs appear in the correct order:

1. **Sequence Attributes**: Sets `sequence` attributes on each tab (metadata for potential future use)
2. **Physical DOM Moves**: Physically moves tabs in the DOM tree to ensure correct rendering order

## Customizing Tab Order

To change the tab order:

1. Edit `views/project_tab_ordering.xml`
2. Update sequence numbers in the first `<record>` (keep gaps of 10 for future insertions)
3. Update the `position="move"` statements in the second `<record>` to match your desired physical order
4. Upgrade the module

## Dependencies

This module depends on all modules that add tabs to the Project form:

- `project` (base)
- `project_custom_fields`
- `project_notes`
- `project_kickoff_checklist`
- `project_past_performance`
- `quality_assurance`
- `capa`
- `bd_bod`
- `project_bonding`
- `incident_reports`
- `lessons_learned`
- `warranty`

**Note**: If new modules are installed that add tabs to the Project form, they should be added to the `depends` list and their tabs should be positioned in this module.

## Technical Details

- **Priority**: 99 for sequence setting, 100 for moves (ensures this runs after module-specific views)
- **Model**: `project.project`
- **Inherits**: `project.edit_project`

## Installation

1. Place the module in your addons directory
2. Update the app list
3. Install "Project Tab Ordering"
4. Refresh the browser

## Avoiding Circular Dependencies

If a new module needs to be added that creates a circular dependency:

1. Remove it from the `depends` list
2. Set that module to depend on `project_tab_ordering` instead
3. Add its tab positioning in this module

## License

LGPL-3.0 or later

### New Dependencies Added

```

### Complete Tab Order (24 tabs)

| # | Tab Name | Sequence | Module |
|---|----------|----------|--------|

### Removed References

- **bd_bod** module (doesn't exist) - all references removed from sequence attributes and physical moves

### Installation Note

2. Update module list
3. Upgrade `project_tab_ordering`

All dependencies verified - no circular dependencies detected.

content.text:
Yes, the **physical DOM moves** (bottom section) are what actually control the tab order in Odoo's UI. The sequence attributes at the top are mostly metadata.

The issue: you commented out warranty moves, which broke the chain. Line 223 tries to position `mail_history` after `technician_daily_reports`, but `technician_daily_reports` was never moved into position.

content.text:
Fixed the physical move chain. Now tabs will render in this order:

**Current Order (without warranty):**
1. Deliverables → Notes → Activities → Closing Checklist → Team → Contract Info → Budget & SOW → Change Orders → Contacts → Marketing → QA → CAPA → Bonding → Incidents → Lessons Learned → Meetings → Subcontractors → Certifications → **Appointments → Technician Daily Reports** → Mail History → BD Mail → Settings

### About Warranty

You commented it out, but `warranty` is still in the `depends` list in `__manifest__.py`. Choose one:

**Option 1: Keep warranty** (uncomment lines 97-99 and add it back to physical moves)
**Option 2: Remove warranty completely** (remove from `__manifest__.py` depends and remove all xpath references)

Which do you prefer?

Project Tab Ordering
====================

This module sets a consistent, predictable order for all tabs on the Project form.

---------------------------
1. Deliverables

3. Activities

20. Warranty

23. BD Mail (Opportunity)
24. Settings

{
    "name": "Project Tab Ordering",
    "version": "18.0.1.0.0",
    "license": "LGPL-3",
    "author": "ACGLP Development Team",
    "category": "Services/Project",
    "summary": "Deterministic tab order on Project form (primary notebook).",
    "description": """
Project Tab Ordering
====================

This module sets a consistent, predictable order for all tabs on the Project form.

Tab Order (left to right):
---------------------------
1. Deliverables
2. Notes
3. Activities
4. Closing Checklist
5. Team
6. Contract Info
7. Budget & SOW
8. Change Orders
9. Project Contacts
10. Marketing
11. Quality Assurance
12. CAPA
13. Bonding
14. Incidents
15. Lessons Learned
16. Meetings
17. Subcontractors
18. Certifications
19. Appointments
20. Warranty
21. Technician Daily Reports
22. Mail History
23. BD Mail (Opportunity)
24. Settings

Dependencies:
-------------
This module depends on all modules that add tabs to ensure proper ordering.
    """,
    "depends": [
        "project",
        "project_custom_fields",
        "project_notes",
        "project_kickoff_checklist",
        "project_past_performance",
        "quality_assurance",
        "capa",
        "project_bonding",
        "incident_reports",
        "lessons_learned",
        "project_change_order",
        "project_dailys",
        "project_mail_history",
        "bd_sourcesought",
    ],
    "data": [
        "views/project_tab_ordering.xml",
    ],
    "installable": True,
    "application": False,
    "auto_install": False,
}

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>
    <!-- Set sequence attributes (metadata / potential future use) -->
    <record id="view_project_form_tab_ordering" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.form.tab.ordering</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.edit_project"/>
        <field name="priority">999</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">

            <!-- 1. DELIVERABLES -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='deliverables']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">10</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 7. BUDGET & SOW -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='budget_sow_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">750</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 8. CHANGE ORDERS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='change_orders']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">85</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 2. NOTES -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='project_notes_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">20</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 3. ACTIVITIES -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='activities_table_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">30</attribute>
            </xpath>         

            <!-- 5. TEAM -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='TEAM']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">50</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 6. CONTRACT INFO -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='contract_info']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">40</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 8. PROJECT CONTACTS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='contacts']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">80</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 10. QUALITY ASSURANCE -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='quality_assurance']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">100</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 11. CAPA -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='capa']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">110</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 12. BONDING -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='bonding']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">120</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 13. INCIDENTS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='incidents']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">130</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 14. LESSONS LEARNED -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='lessons_learned']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">140</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 15. MEETINGS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='project_meetings']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">150</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 16. SUBCONTRACTORS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='subcontractors_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">160</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 17. CERTIFICATIONS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='certifications']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">170</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 18. APPOINTMENTS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='appointments_page']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">180</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 19. WARRANTY -->
            <!-- <xpath expr="//page[@name='warranty']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">190</attribute>
            </xpath> -->

            <!-- 20. TECHNICIAN DAILY REPORTS -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='technician_daily_reports']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">200</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 21. MAIL HISTORY -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='mail_history']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">210</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 22. BD MAIL (OPPORTUNITY) -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='source_opportunity_bd_mail']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">220</attribute>
            </xpath>
            
            <!-- 9. MARKETING -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='marketing']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">800</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- 4. CLOSING CHECKLIST -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='closing_checklist_tab']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">900</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- Settings tab - push to end -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='settings']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="sequence">1000</attribute>
            </xpath>

        </field>
    </record>

    <!-- Physical DOM order (what the web client actually renders) -->
    <record id="view_project_form_tab_ordering_moves" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.form.tab.ordering.moves</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.edit_project"/>
        <field name="priority">100</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">

            <!-- Move tabs into desired physical order -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='deliverables']" position="after">
                <page name="project_notes_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='project_notes_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="activities_table_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='activities_table_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="closing_checklist_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='closing_checklist_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="TEAM" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='TEAM']" position="after">
                <page name="contract_info" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='contract_info']" position="after">
                <page name="budget_sow_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='budget_sow_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="change_orders" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='change_orders']" position="after">
                <page name="contacts" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='contacts']" position="after">
                <page name="marketing" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='marketing']" position="after">
                <page name="quality_assurance" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='quality_assurance']" position="after">
                <page name="capa" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='capa']" position="after">
                <page name="bonding" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='bonding']" position="after">
                <page name="incidents" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='incidents']" position="after">
                <page name="lessons_learned" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='lessons_learned']" position="after">
                <page name="project_meetings" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='project_meetings']" position="after">
                <page name="subcontractors_tab" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='subcontractors_tab']" position="after">
                <page name="certifications" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='certifications']" position="after">
                <page name="appointments_page" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='appointments_page']" position="after">
                <page name="technician_daily_reports" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='technician_daily_reports']" position="after">
                <page name="mail_history" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='mail_history']" position="after">
                <page name="source_opportunity_bd_mail" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//page[@name='source_opportunity_bd_mail']" position="after">
                <page name="settings" position="move"/>
            </xpath>

        </field>
    </record>
</odoo>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Project Tab Ordering

## Overview

This module provides deterministic, consistent ordering for all tabs on the Project form view. Without this module, tab order depends on module installation order, which can vary between environments.

## Current Tab Order

The tabs appear in this order (left to right):

1. **Deliverables** - Project deliverables and milestones
2. **Notes** - Project notes and comments
3. **Activities** - Planned and done activities
4. **Closing Checklist** - Project closing checklist items
5. **Team** - Project team members
6. **Contract Info** - Contract information and details
7. **Budget & SOW** - Budget and Scope of Work
8. **Change Orders** - Project change orders
9. **Project Contacts** - Project-related contacts
10. **Marketing** - Past performance and marketing info
11. **Quality Assurance** - QA records and documentation
12. **CAPA** - Corrective and Preventive Actions
13. **Bonding** - Project bonding information
14. **Incidents** - Incident reports
15. **Lessons Learned** - Lessons learned documentation
16. **Meetings** - Project meetings
17. **Subcontractors** - Subcontractor information
18. **Certifications** - Project certifications
19. **Appointments** - Project appointments
20. **Warranty** - Warranty information
21. **Technician Daily Reports** - Daily activity reports
22. **Mail History** - Email communications tracking
23. **BD Mail (Opportunity)** - Business development emails (conditional)
24. **Settings** - Project settings (at the end)

## How It Works

The module uses two approaches to ensure tabs appear in the correct order:

1. **Sequence Attributes**: Sets `sequence` attributes on each tab (metadata for potential future use)
2. **Physical DOM Moves**: Physically moves tabs in the DOM tree to ensure correct rendering order

## Customizing Tab Order

To change the tab order:

1. Edit `views/project_tab_ordering.xml`
2. Update sequence numbers in the first `<record>` (keep gaps of 10 for future insertions)
3. Update the `position="move"` statements in the second `<record>` to match your desired physical order
4. Upgrade the module

## Dependencies

This module depends on all modules that add tabs to the Project form:

- `project` (base)
- `project_custom_fields`
- `project_notes`
- `project_kickoff_checklist`
- `project_past_performance`
- `quality_assurance`
- `capa`
- `project_bonding`
- `incident_reports`
- `lessons_learned`
- `warranty`
- `project_change_order`
- `project_dailys`
- `project_mail_history`
- `bd_sourcesought`

**Note**: If new modules are installed that add tabs to the Project form, they should be added to the `depends` list and their tabs should be positioned in this module.

## Technical Details

- **Priority**: 99 for sequence setting, 100 for moves (ensures this runs after module-specific views)
- **Model**: `project.project`
- **Inherits**: `project.edit_project`

## Installation

1. Place the module in your addons directory
2. Update the app list
3. Install "Project Tab Ordering"
4. Refresh the browser

## Avoiding Circular Dependencies

If a new module needs to be added that creates a circular dependency:

1. Remove it from the `depends` list
2. Set that module to depend on `project_tab_ordering` instead
3. Add its tab positioning in this module

## License

LGPL-3.0 or later
